since_last: 31% of 89 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +2.17%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 31% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.01% · BTC -2.05% · Gold +1.20% · Nasdaq100 +0.75%. 31% of 89 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +2.17%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +2.17%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.63%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMAT is the standout at +12.23%
cards.body: Leaders: AMAT +12.23%, MU +11.73%, TER +9.78%, KLAC +6.60%, LRCX +6.32%. Laggards: INOD -10.46%, DELL -6.64%, MGNI -6.40%, AAPL -6.07%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.38% at $152.41
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.38% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
